creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
The freebsd-papers repo (used to generate the https://papers.freebsd.org/
website) has a corresponding github access group called "papers". The current maintainer is bapt@

Can allanjude@ and lwhsu@ be promoted to maintainers of this group so we can add additional contributors who are helping with the site?

Our github usernames match our FreeBSD usernames, and we are already members of the freebsd organization on github.
